reasons: Lolita can provide shield support and frontline protection that helps Hanabi keep attacking safely.
Hanabi can deal bouncing basic-attack damage from behind Lolita while Lolita blocks or absorbs incoming ranged pressure.

proof.summary: Lolita gives nearby ally shielding and frontline protection, while Hanabi benefits from shield uptime to keep attacking more safely in lane and teamfights.
worksBestWhen: Hanabi stays close enough to receive Lolita's shield value.
Lolita positions between Hanabi and the enemy's main ranged pressure.
The team plays patiently around Hanabi's protected damage window.
failureCases: Hanabi is forced away from Lolita's shield range.
Enemy divers flank around Lolita and reach Hanabi directly.
The enemy breaks Hanabi's shield before the key crowd-control threat arrives.

reasons: Lolita protects Bruno in lane and teamfights, giving him safer windows to trade and scale.
Bruno can deal damage from behind Lolita while she blocks ranged pressure from the front.

proof.summary: Lolita blocks ranged pressure and stands in front, while Bruno deals damage from behind her protection.
worksBestWhen: Lolita shields the direction of enemy poke.
Bruno keeps safe spacing behind Lolita.
failureCases: Enemy divers attack Bruno from behind.
Lolita is forced to use shield before the main poke arrives.

reasons: Lolita gives Layla the protection she needs to keep firing from long range.
Layla benefits from Lolita's shield and control because she wants to stay protected behind the frontline.

proof.summary: Lolita protects Layla from ranged pressure and creates a safer front line for Layla's long-range damage.
worksBestWhen: Layla stays behind Lolita's shield angle.
Lolita saves control for enemies trying to dive Layla.
failureCases: Enemy assassins flank around the shield.

reasons: Lolita can protect space and create control windows while Pharsa follows from long range.
Pharsa benefits when Lolita blocks pressure and gives her time to cast from safer positioning.

proof.summary: Lolita creates a protected frontline or stun window, while Pharsa punishes enemies from safe range.
worksBestWhen: Lolita controls enemies before Pharsa commits damage.
Pharsa stays outside enemy dive range.
failureCases: Pharsa is forced to reposition before the follow-up.

reasons: Lolita can create an AoE control window that helps Odette land her teamfight damage.
Odette benefits when Lolita slows or controls enemies before Odette commits to her damage window.

proof.summary: Lolita controls or slows enemies through her engage window, while Odette follows with AoE damage when enemies cannot easily escape.
worksBestWhen: Lolita confirms enough control before Odette commits.
Odette avoids being interrupted during her damage window.
failureCases: Lolita's setup is avoided or baited.
